sources.label: Facebook Events
sources.prompt: Search Facebook Events (facebook.com/events) for free community events, meetups, markets, and local gatherings happening on the travel dates

sources.label: Eventbrite
sources.prompt: Search Eventbrite (eventbrite.com) for ticketed workshops, festivals, food tours, and cultural experiences with confirmed dates and booking links

sources.label: Meetup
sources.prompt: Search Meetup (meetup.com) for group activities, language exchanges, hiking groups, and social events travelers can join

sources.label: TripAdvisor
sources.prompt: Reference TripAdvisor (tripadvisor.com) for top-rated attractions, restaurants with current reviews, and bookable tours ranked by traveler satisfaction

sources.label: Viator
sources.prompt: Search Viator (viator.com) for bookable guided tours, skip-the-line museum tickets, day trips, and local experience packages with prices

sources.label: GetYourGuide
sources.prompt: Search GetYourGuide (getyourguide.com) for bookable walking tours, cooking classes, skip-the-line tickets, and curated local experiences

sources.label: Time Out
sources.prompt: Reference Time Out (timeout.com) for editorially curated city guides: best new restaurants, nightlife picks, weekend activities, and seasonal events

sources.label: Yelp
sources.prompt: Reference Yelp (yelp.com) for highly-rated local restaurants, bars, cafes, and services with recent review scores and price ranges

sources.label: Google Events
sources.prompt: Search Google Events for upcoming concerts, exhibitions, sports, and public events with confirmed dates at the destination

sources.label: Songkick
sources.prompt: Search Songkick (songkick.com) for live music: concerts, festival lineups, and artist tour dates at venues near the destination

sources.label: Resident Advisor
sources.prompt: Search Resident Advisor (ra.co) for electronic music events, club nights, DJ sets, and underground music venues

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Italia.it
sources.prompt: Search Italia.it (italia.it/en/italy/things-to-do/events) for officially listed Italian festivals, cultural events, museum exhibitions, and seasonal celebrations by region and date

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Today Network
sources.prompt: Search the Italian city Today network — romatoday.it for Rome, milanotoday.it for Milan, napolitoday.it for Naples, firenzetoday.it for Florence, torinotoday.it for Turin, palermotoday.it for Palermo, bolognatoday.it for Bologna — for hyperlocal events, sagre, street food festivals, neighborhood feste, and what's-on-this-weekend guides

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Dove Viaggi
sources.prompt: Reference Dove Viaggi (viaggi.corriere.it) for curated Italian weekend getaway ideas, seasonal travel guides, food and wine itineraries, and regional event calendars

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Wanted in Rome
sources.prompt: Search Wanted in Rome (wantedinrome.com/whatson) for Rome's current exhibitions, museum openings, concerts, outdoor cinema, and English-friendly cultural events

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Turismo Roma
sources.prompt: Search Turismo Roma (turismoroma.it/en) for Rome's official events calendar: public festivals, free museum nights, guided archaeological tours, and city-sponsored cultural programs

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Dolcevia
sources.prompt: Search Dolcevia (dolcevia.com/en/events) for curated Italian sagre (food festivals), wine harvest events, concert seasons, and regional cultural highlights across Rome, Florence, Venice, Milan, and Naples

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Visititaly.eu
sources.prompt: Reference Visititaly.eu for region-by-region Italian event guides, hidden-gem destinations, seasonal highlights, and off-the-beaten-path experiences

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Citalia
sources.prompt: Reference Citalia (citalia.com) for landmark Italian experiences: Arena di Verona opera season, Palio di Siena, Chianti wine tastings, Amalfi Coast excursions, and Lake Como events

sources.label: 🇮🇹 Invitation to Tuscany
sources.prompt: Search Invitation to Tuscany (invitationtotuscany.com) for Tuscan events: wine festivals, olive oil harvest celebrations, medieval palio races, truffle fairs, and sagre in Chianti, Val d'Orcia, and Maremma

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Spain.info
sources.prompt: Search Spain.info (spain.info/en/calendar) for Spain's official tourism calendar: fiestas patronales, cultural exhibitions, sporting events, and religious celebrations filterable by region, theme, and date

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Guía Repsol
sources.prompt: Reference Guía Repsol (guiarepsol.com) for Spain's best restaurants by region, tapas routes, scenic driving itineraries, local market days, and village fiestas off the tourist trail

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Time Out España
sources.prompt: Search Time Out Barcelona and Time Out Madrid (timeout.es) for urban event picks: new restaurant openings, rooftop bars, nightlife, exhibitions, and weekend plans curated by local editors

sources.label: 🇪🇸 esMadrid
sources.prompt: Search esMadrid (esmadrid.com/en/events-calendar) for Madrid's official events: San Isidro festival, Veranos de la Villa summer program, Reina Sofía exhibitions, Rastro market, and gastronomy weeks

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Spanish Fiestas
sources.prompt: Reference Spanish-Fiestas.com for a comprehensive Spanish festival calendar with exact dates: Fallas de Valencia, Feria de Abril in Seville, San Fermín in Pamplona, La Tomatina in Buñol, Semana Santa processions, and Carnaval de Tenerife

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Barcelona Turisme
sources.prompt: Search Barcelona Turisme (barcelonaturisme.com) for Barcelona's official events: La Mercè festival, Grec Summer Festival, Primavera Sound, Sant Jordi book day, Festa Major de Gràcia, and Gaudi-related exhibitions

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Visit Sevilla
sources.prompt: Search Visita Sevilla (visitasevilla.es) for Seville's events: Feria de Abril casetas, Semana Santa brotherhood processions, flamenco tablaos, Triana tapas routes, and Alcázar night visits

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Visit Valencia
sources.prompt: Search Visit Valencia (visitvalencia.com) for Valencia events: Fallas monuments and mascleta schedule, La Tomatina day trips, City of Arts exhibitions, paella competitions, and Horchata routes in Alboraya

sources.label: 🇪🇸 Spanaly
sources.prompt: Reference Spanaly (spanaly.com) for in-depth guides to regional Spanish fiestas, autonomous community celebrations, Camino de Santiago events, and cultural calendars across Andalucía, Basque Country, Galicia, and Catalonia

sources.label: 🇫🇷 France.fr
sources.prompt: Search France.fr for officially listed French events: music festivals, heritage days, wine harvest celebrations, and cultural exhibitions by region

sources.label: 🇫🇷 Sortir à Paris
sources.prompt: Search Sortir à Paris (sortiraparis.com) for Paris events: exhibitions, outdoor activities, family outings, free events, and seasonal happenings with dates and addresses

sources.label: 🇫🇷 L'Officiel
sources.prompt: Reference L'Officiel des Spectacles for Paris and French entertainment: theatre, cinema, concerts, dance performances, and gallery openings

sources.label: 🇩🇪 Germany Travel
sources.prompt: Search Germany Travel (germany.travel) for German events: Oktoberfest, Christmas markets, music festivals, and regional celebrations by state and season

sources.label: 🇩🇪 Berlin.de
sources.prompt: Search Berlin.de for Berlin's events calendar: concerts, club nights, gallery openings, street food markets, and cultural festivals

sources.label: 🇬🇧 Visit Britain
sources.prompt: Search Visit Britain (visitbritain.com) for UK events: royal celebrations, music festivals, sporting events, and seasonal attractions across England, Scotland, and Wales

sources.label: 🇬🇧 Londonist
sources.prompt: Reference Londonist (londonist.com) for London's hidden gems, unusual events, free activities, walking tours, and offbeat things to do this week

sources.label: 🇺🇸 Eventful
sources.prompt: Search Bandsintown/Eventful for US concerts, comedy shows, sports events, and local entertainment with ticket links and venue details

sources.label: 🇯🇵 JNTO
sources.prompt: Search Japan National Tourism Organization (japan.travel) for Japanese festivals: matsuri, cherry blossom forecasts, temple events, seasonal illuminations, and cultural experiences

sources.label: 🇵🇹 Visit Portugal
sources.prompt: Search Visit Portugal (visitportugal.com) for Portuguese events: Santos Populares, Fado nights, wine harvest festivals, surf competitions, and Algarve seasonal events

sources.label: 🇳🇱 Holland.com
sources.prompt: Search Holland.com for Dutch events: King's Day celebrations, tulip season, museum exhibitions, canal festivals, and design week events

sources.label: 🇬🇷 Visit Greece
sources.prompt: Search Visit Greece (visitgreece.gr) for Greek events: Easter celebrations, island panigiria, wine festivals, archaeological site events, and summer open-air cinema
